title: World Bank Commodity Price Data (The Pink Sheet) — Monthly historical prices
countries: N/A (world commodity benchmark prices, not country-level)
units: nominal US dollars; per-commodity units in header rows and Description sheet
license_terms: World Bank terms of use (CC BY-4.0 open data terms)
notes: July 2026 edition of the Pink Sheet historical monthly workbook. Sheets: Monthly Prices, Monthly Indices, Description, Index Weights. Poultry is labelled 'Chicken' (Meat, chicken) in the workbook; orange prices under 'Orange'. Verified coverage 1960M01 through 2026M06 (798 monthly periods). Link discovered from the Commodity Markets research page on 2026-07-12; the thedocs.worldbank.org path segment changes with each monthly edition.
